message:
fix(harness,layout,error): clippy and idiomatic Rust cleanups

- Replace `.clone()` with `*caps` (Copy dereference) in golden_frame_e2e.rs
  Presenter::new calls to silence unnecessary-clone lint
- Reorder `use` imports alphabetically in e2e_tracing test
- Remove unused imports (Sides, PaneConstraints, PaneLayout,
  PANE_DEFAULT_MARGIN_CELLS, PANE_DEFAULT_PADDING_CELLS) from
  pane_margin.rs, keeping only what the test actually uses
- Replace `std::io::Error::new(std::io::ErrorKind::Other, ...)` with the
  shorter `std::io::Error::other(...)` stabilised helper in error.rs tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
